purpose: Overnight synthesis of 2026-07-01/02 autonomous work: per-leg friction multiplier implementation, corrected predictivity story, mesh self-generation de-risk, and T2 insulation-run flag.

headline_findings.corrected_predictivity: Earlier 'closures improve mdot' was an artifact of running 60 K too hot. At matched T, CFD closures make mdot WORSE. mdot is condition-dependent; use per-segment dP instead.
headline_findings.dominant_lever: Thermal boundary (insulation/ambient-loss) is the dominant 1D error lever, more important than hydraulic closures.
headline_findings.open_factor_2: Factor-2 mdot discrepancy at matched T with CFD friction — no validated mechanism.
headline_findings.mesh_gci_blocker: refineMesh geometrically correct (×8, 100% hex) but refined NCC interface breaks OF13 fvMeshStitcher at runtime. Fix: conformal-first remesh.

model_improvement_ranking: Match effective thermal boundary (insulation UA) to each CFD case
Reconcile loop momentum budget term-by-term to explain factor-2
Fix T2 timestep / acceleration to reach steady state
limitations: All CFD reference is coarse mesh (no GCI bound, T6 blocked).
T2 insulation runs advancing ~22 s/hr vs 25000 s needed — will not reach steady.
No validated mechanism for the factor-2 mdot discrepancy at matched T.
Mesh GCI not produced (correctly, not fabricated).
